prompt: Investigate IDS detection 4294968249 (ET ATTACK_RESPONSE PowerShell NoProfile Command Received In Powershell Stagers) on 172.16.206.50.
notes: Real adjudicated case from the acmelegal.lab environment (2026-07). IDS signature (SID 2026988) fired on HTTP responses to huggingface.co. Records reveal the true offender is 172.16.204.153 (behind proxy 172.16.206.50) polling the HF Qwen2.5-Coder inference API with User-Agent 'LameHug-Sim/1.0' and receiving application/x-powershell payloads — an LLM-as-C2 channel (LameHug family). Malicious, NOT the huggingface false-positive a naive IDS triage would assume. Requires the record tier to distinguish.
